tools.name: render_pdf
tools.description: Render a professional PDF (invoice/receipt/contract/document) from inline `html` or a stored `template` + `data`, and return the PDF. Provide exactly one of `html` or `template`. Supports paper format, orientation, margins and scale. Requires an API key (Authorization: Bearer) — get one at https://p

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "render_pdf" references sensitive artifacts (authorization, bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.
